rationale: The citing paper note frames contributions around extending Park & Gupta’s copula endogeneity method for fixed-effects panels, and it does not mention this 2011 advertising-elasticity meta-analysis as part of its methodological lineage. The only linkage provided is a single DOI-level reference match with no in-text context, while the cited paper is primarily an empirical meta-analysis rather than a copula/panel-estimation method paper. Given this sparse evidence, it cannot be safely dropped outright, but substantive use is also not clearly supported.
